emails.theme: Light Up the 4th: Patriotic Party Collection
emails.product: USA Button Pins (48), Patriotic Tattoos (144), USA Face Paint Kit, Patriotic Accessories Set
emails.shortDescription: 4th of July and America's 250th. Patriotic Party Collection for events, party favors, parades, and backyard celebrations.
emails.creativeDirection: Patriotic red/white/blue, navy hero with America's 250th tag, 4 stacked product cards (alternating image side) each with green Shop Now, red collection CTA band, trust signals, conversational closer.

emails.theme: The Toys Keeping Kids Busy All Summer (Best Sellers)
emails.product: Bubble Lawn Mower, Bump & Go Light Up Car, Yellow School Bus (11" friction), Traffic Light Lamp with Remote
emails.shortDescription: Best-seller feature with a fresh summer fun angle per client brief Jul 7. Four favorites for sunny days and rainy afternoons: Bubble Lawn Mower (outdoor), Bump & Go Light Up Car (sensory), Yellow School Bus (back-to-school tie-in), Traffic Light Lamp (red light green light game + room decor). Buy More Save More bookended.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 7. All 4 verified live + in stock via .js 2026-07-07, images 200. No pricing, no hyphens/dashes in copy. Alternating mint/white product rows, distinct from Jul 1 patriotic layout.
emails.creativeDirection: Nunito, white bg, sky-blue hero + yellow eyebrow, yellow offer banner (top bookend), 4 alternating mint/white product cards each with green rounded Shop Now, text-only offer reminder (no stacked CTA), 3-up trust bar, conversational closer.

emails.product: Kids' Camera Toy Set (Pack of 12), Bendable Planets (Solar System set)
emails.shortDescription: Curiosity/discovery angle for two products: one points a kid at the world around them (the Kids' Camera, a little photographer), the other puts the solar system in their hands (Bendable Planets, a little astronomer). Backyard to outer space, screen-free play. Offer kept light (free shipping $30+).
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 16 (July 17, find an interesting angle; 2 products). Both verified available:true via .js 2026-07-16, images 200. No pricing, no hyphens. Distinct layout from Jul 10.
emails.creativeDirection: Nunito, white bg, 'Curiosity Unlocked' yellow eyebrow + sky-blue hero, two-way split intro (camera / planets emoji cards), two large discovery feature blocks (blue camera, yellow planets) each with green rounded Shop Now, 'two small toys one big idea' note, 3-up trust bar, curiosity closer.
